name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (loopback banner probe)
description: Initial Access / TA0001. Probe loopback port 80 for an HTTP server banner. The probe is a connect-and-read with a 2-second timeout; nothing is sent that would resemble an exploit payload. Captures the service-fingerprinting step that precedes exploitation. Loopback-only: target 127.0.0.1 is structural in the exec field.
exec: echo '--- loopback :80 banner probe ---'; timeout 2 bash -c 'exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/80 2>/dev/null && (printf "HEAD / HTTP/1.0\r\n\r\n" >&3; head -c 200 <&3) || echo "no listener on 127.0.0.1:80 (probe failed — expected on a host without httpd)"'; echo 'note: TCP connect to loopback only. no exploit payload sent.'
